calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Brandon Tang, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, HARTFORD CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY, a corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) LANCE LASHGWA, an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Gail Horvath and Tim Bennett sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $80,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,022.47
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $513.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $83,535.47
Judgment signed in open court.
